objective: Design and establish a governance-driven, structured, and recoverable system architecture that enables consistent execution, documentation-based decision making, and environment recreation across machines.
decisions: System will be organized using phase-based architecture
Phase 0 is defined as Governance + Operating Framework
All system knowledge will be stored in structured documentation files
Files act as decision-guiding tools, not automated execution systems
Old phase data must never be deleted; only appended or marked complete
Git will be used for version control and persistence
System will not be automated at current stage; automation deferred to later phases
Recovery system will use GitHub + setup script + environment configuration
Manual context injection is required for ChatGPT continuity
Use of structured prompts to simulate system awareness
Setup script (setup.sh) will handle environment recreation
Sensitive data must not be stored in repository; use .env and .gitignore
System validation must include full recovery simulation
Files must be updated incrementally, not rewritten completely
Daily workflow must include file updates and Git commits
JSON consolidation is required to unify system memory across chats
Forensic extraction mode and execution mode defined for system control
built_components: Documentation structure including MASTER_CONTEXT.md, PHASE_STATE.md, CHANGELOG.md (conceptual)
Decision-making model based on file layers
Chat context control system using structured prompts
Execution system rules for controlled progression
System pointer map consolidating all components
inputs: User queries about system structure, file usage, and execution
User concerns about missing knowledge and confusion
User questions on Git workflow and updates
User questions on file maintenance and deletion
User queries about automation and one-command system setup
User requirement for system recovery after crash
User request for audit and completeness verification
User request for non-duplicated system pointer
outputs: Detailed explanation of system architecture and governance
Chat continuity and context injection method
Clarification of manual vs automated system behavior
Explanation of cat << EOF command usage
Recovery system design with setup.sh and environment files
dependencies: Node.js or Python dependency management (package.json / requirements.txt)
Structured documentation files for system memory
ChatGPT for execution assistance and structured reasoning
notes: System architecture, governance, and recovery design are fully defined, but actual implementation steps such as file creation, setup.sh, .env.example, .gitignore, GitHub synchronization, and recovery validation are not confirmed as executed.
